subcodes.first_line: We have heard the call of those who turned when they hearkened unto the Call from the Most Exalted Horizon, and verily, I am the Compassionate One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا سمعنا ندآء الذین اقبلوا اذ سمعوا الندآء من الافق الاعلی و انا المشفق
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
